query:
UPDATE properties SET bathrooms = '5' WHERE id = 7;
INSERT INTO properties (title, titleTh, description, descriptionTh, propertyType, price, priceEur, sizeSqm, bedrooms, bathrooms, features, images, status, listingType, featured, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('Brand-New Tropical Villa - Sam Roi Yod National Park', 'วิลล่าเขตรักษาพันธุ์สัตว์ป่าแห่งชาติแสนร้อยยอด', 'A stunning brand-new tropical villa located within the pristine Khao Sam Roi Yot National Park. This modern villa offers breathtaking views and direct access to nature.', 'วิลล่าเขตรักษาพันธุ์สัตว์ป่าแห่งชาติแสนร้อยยอด', 'villa', 3600000, 99000, 1, 2, '2.5', '[\"seaView\", \"pool\", \"furnished\"]', '[\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512917774080-9991f1c4c750?w=800\"]', 'available', 'sale', 0, NOW(), NOW());
command:

This modern villa offers breathtaking views and direct access to nature.', 'วิลล่าเขตรักษาพันธุ์สัตว์ป่าแห่งชาติแสนร้อยยอด', 'villa', 3600000, 99000, 1, 2, '2.5', '[\"seaView\", \"pool\", \"furnished\"]', '[\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512917774080-9991f1c4c750?w=800\"]', 'available', 'sale', 0, NOW(), NOW());
